ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ode_problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ODE problem */,
  "problem_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the ODE problem */,
  "equation" TEXT /* Equation of the ODE problem */,
  "initial_condition" TEXT /* Initial condition of the ODE problem */,
  "exact_solution" TEXT /* Exact solution of the ODE problem */,
  "author" TEXT /* Researcher who created the problem */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the problem was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the problem was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ODE problem */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags to categorize the ODE problem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "numerical_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each numerical method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the numerical method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the numerical method */,
  "author" TEXT /* Researcher who implemented the numerical method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the numerical method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the numerical method was last updated */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the numerical method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approximations" (
  "approximation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approximation */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ODE problem being approximated */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the numerical method used for approximation */,
  "h" REAL /* Step size used for approximation */,
  "t" REAL /* Time point at which the approximation is made */,
  "x(t)" REAL /* Approximated value of x(t) */,
  "x'(t)" REAL /* Approximated value of x'(t) */,
  "error" REAL /* Error between the approximated solution and the exact solution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the approximation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the approximation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the approximation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approximation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approximations_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES numerical_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approximations_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES ode_problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ODE problem being accessed */,
  "approximation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the approximation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the ODE problem or approximation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the ODE problem or approximation was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES ode_problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_approximation_id FOREIGN KEY ("approximation_id") REFERENCES approximations ("approximation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
